# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI
on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
      - develop
jobs:
  build-and-test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v3
      - name: Cache node modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v3.0.1
        env:
          cache-name: "node-modules-${{ hashFiles('package*.json') }}"
        with:
          path: ~/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-module-cache
      - name: Cache pip packages
        id: cache-pip-packages
        uses: actions/cache@v3.0.1
        env:
          cache-name: "pip-packages-${{ hashFiles('requirements*.txt') }}"
        with:
          path: ~/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-package-cache
      - name: Cache configuration files
        id: cache-config-files
        uses: actions/cache@v3.0.1
        env:
          cache-name: "config-${{ hashFiles('config.json') }}"
        with:
          path: ~/
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-cache
      - name: Install dependencies (npm)
        run: |
          npm install
      - name: Build
        run: |
          npm run build
      - name: Install dependencies (pip)
        run: |
          pip install -r requirements.txt
      - name: Test
        run: |
          npm test
